name: Custom Search Filters
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Please Note", "bold": true}, {"text": ": The example below focuses on orders, however the steps to create customised filters are the same for all pages."}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Create a custom order filter"}], "data-id": "how-do-i-create-a-custom-order-filter"}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto control panel navigate to "}, {"text": "Orders", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "View All Orders", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Open the filter options by clicking on the down arrow on the right of the filter box."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Set your filters to display the orders that you are wanting to save and click "}, {"text": "Apply", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "To save these filters click on the "}, {"text": "Custom Filters", "bold": true}, {"text": " button above the order list. The select "}, {"text": "Save Current Filter.", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Enter a name for your filter. If you would like to share this filter with other staff members, check "}, {"text": "Save Filter For All Users", "bold": true}, {"text": ". Click "}, {"text": "Okay", "bold": true}, {"text": " to save the filter."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Once your filter has been saved it will appear as a new filter in the "}, {"text": "Custom Filters", "bold": true}, {"text": " list. You can also select "}, {"text": "Manage Filters", "bold": true}, {"text": " to delete a filter, make it system wide, or to get the link to it for the next step."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Add A Filter To The Control Panel Menu"}], "data-id": "add-a-filter-to-the-control-panel-menu"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can also add filters to the control panel menu so you can quickly access those that you use most often."}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto control panel navigate to "}, {"text": "Settings & Tools", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "All Settings & Tools", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "From the side menu select "}, {"text": "Control Panel", "bold": true}, {"text": " and choose "}, {"text": "Custom Control Panel Links", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click "}, {"text": "Add New Menu Item", "bold": true}, {"text": ", enter a "}, {"text": "Name", "bold": true}, {"text": " and add the link to your filter. Click "}, {"text": "Accept", "bold": true}, {"text": " and then "}, {"text": "Save", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Refresh your control panel, and you will now have a menu item called "}, {"text": "Custom Links", "bold": true}, {"text": " which includes your filter."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Use relative time in filters"}], "data-id": "using-relative-time-in-order-filters"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "One of the most popular fields to filter orders by is date placed. So that date placed can be used in custom filters Neto supports relative times / dates in its date filter fields. For example you can filter an order list to show all orders placed more than 6 hours ago. Use the relative time / date fields in a date filter to achieve this."}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Example Use Case:"}], "data-id": "example-use-case"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "So that you can fulfill a large number of orders efficiently in a batch pick fashion you may want to frequently return a list of all orders that only have products in a single pick zone, sorted by date placed."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "In this case you would set up a custom filter with the following parameters:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Multi Pick Zones = Single Pick Zone"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Sort By = date placed, ascending"}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Users can then use this custom filter to return the orders they need to fulfill at the click of a button."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "For example a user wanted to further refine your filter to only display orders that were placed more than 6 hours ago they could add the date placed filter "}, {"text": "Date Placed To", "bold": true}, {"text": ": 6 hours ago."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]
